content: agent1 here: implementing 'Add Shell Escape Prevention to Click's Edit Function' - adding escape_shell param to click.edit(). Will touch src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py.

agent1: done with escape_shell param. Added to click.edit() signature (after filename), Editor.__init__ (after extension), and used inside Editor.edit_file via shlex.quote when True. Your working_dir param appended at the end should not conflict - just make sure edit_file's Popen call still works with escape_shell logic I added (I introduced a 'command' local var built via if/else before subprocess.Popen(command, ...)). Go ahead.
